highlights: Gwangju Biennale 2026 theme announced: 'You Must Change Your Life', artistic director Ho Tzu Nyen.
Art Sonje Center hosts 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' exhibition starting March.
Digital art exhibit '20! 2026 Art Seoul' launched March 16 with refund and authentication features.

stocks.market_sentiment: Volatile; anticipation around new BOK leadership.
key_events: Shin Hyun-song, BIS economist, nominated as next Bank of Korea Governor by President Lee Jae-myung.
Focus on global economic uncertainty and inflation management under new BOK leadership.
Market remains cautious regarding policy shifts.
